audit_items.proof_trace: The property is enforced at lines 350-351: when `asset == s_assetOut`, `IERC20(asset).safeTransfer(s_assetOutReceiver, balanceOf(address(this)))` is called; the else branch (auction start) is only taken when `asset != s_assetOut`. `s_assetOut` cannot change mid-execution because `setAssetOut` is guarded by `_whenNoLiveAuctions()` and `onlyRole(ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE)`, preventing reentrancy from trusted external calls (oracle reads, feeAggregator). All paths through the eligible assets loop correctly distinguish and forward assetOut tokens.
